PD MOT TO ADD TO CALENDAR TO CLARIFY RELEASE COND  FILED

/SENTENCE/TWS/CH4:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 3D/CTS:3/PF390 18/VF2:150/FOP1: 3MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/X:THE DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 60 DAYS SCRAM, THE DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETEDTHIS REQUIREMENT/X:THE COURT ORDERS THAT SCRAM ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE IS TERMINATED FORTHWITH, THE DEFENDANTSHALL CHECK INWITH SFSD COMMUNITY PROGRAMS STAFF AND RETURN ALL ISSUEDEQUIPMENT/SATERM/SAORD/SA1:RODERICK MCDONOUGH/SAORD2/SAORD3/CTORD: GENERAL ORDER FOR RESTITUTION AS TO ANY & ALL VICTIMS AT THIS TIME/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITIONGIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL: PUBLIC DEFENDER ADD TO CALENDAR TO CLARIFY RELEASE CONDITIONS/DAWT//CTORD: DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO TRAVEL TO LAKE TAHOE FOR A WORK CONFERENCE BETWEEN 04-17-21 TO 04-19-21/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/CAUSE1/LDPX:06-01-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/NALC/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA5:RODERICK MCDONOUGH/SAORD2/SAORD4:20 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 HOUR/DOP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING & POSSIBLE DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST& CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
